cases.description: Creates an interactive calculator CLI in a run-scoped output directory.
cases.prompt: Create an interactive calculator CLI in `.outputs/calculator-{{runId}}`. Use Bun and TypeScript with the entrypoint at `.outputs/calculator-{{runId}}/main.ts`. The program must read one line at a time from stdin, evaluate arithmetic expressions using `+`, `-`, `*`, `/`, and parentheses, print successful evaluations as `RESULT=<value>`, print invalid input as `ERROR=<message>`, continue running after invalid input, and exit cleanly when the user enters `exit`. Verify it by piping a sample session into `bun .outputs/calculator-{{runId}}/main.ts`. When finished, answer with exactly one line: EVAL_RESULT=ok

objectiveChecks.name: calculator repl session
objectiveChecks.command:
test -f .outputs/calculator-{{runId}}/main.ts
output="$(bun .outputs/calculator-{{runId}}/main.ts <<'EOF'
1 + 2
bad input
10 / 4
exit
EOF
)"
printf '%s' "$output"
